ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Ah, my dear traveler! I see you're in a rush and need healing potions quickly before another rainstorm hits us here by Canyon Relay.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall quality is good, but the response could be more urgent to match persona.

[baseline_no_context] Ah, my dear traveler, the winds of fortune blow strongly today! While your request is tempting and we are indeed partners here at heart, remember that fairness must prevail even when time seems to be against you.<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5
